engineGuide.h2: Nissan Caravan Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Nissan Caravan across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.7L Diesel
entries.history: The backbone of UK commercial Caravan sales, offering robust torque and simple mechanical injection that keeps fleet maintenance costs low for decades.
compatibleVariants: E24 2.7D, E24 LWB 2.7D, E25 2.7D, Urvan 2.7D, Homy 2.7D
commonFailures: Cylinder head gasket failure at 80k-120k miles due to high thermal load
Turbo actuator sticking on late TD27ETi variants
Injector pump wear causing hard cold starts
entries.cta: Get quotes for TD27 Nissan Caravan engine replacement

entries.title: 4.2L Diesel
entries.history: A heavy-duty torque monster introduced for E28, designed for maximum payload and towing capacity in commercial and minibus applications.
compatibleVariants: E28 4.2D, E28 High Roof, E28 4WD, Urvan 4.2D
commonFailures: EGR cooler cracking leading to coolant loss and white smoke
Turbo bearing failure under sustained heavy loads
Crankshaft main bearing wear past 100k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for TD42 Nissan Caravan engine replacement

entries.title: 3.0L Diesel
entries.history: Common-rail successor to older units, offering refined power and improved emissions, but sensitive to fuel quality and maintenance schedules.
commonFailures: Piezo injector failure causing rough idle and misfires
EGR valve carbon buildup restricting airflow
Turbo wastegate sticking around 70k miles

entries.title: 2.5L Diesel
entries.history: The modern workhorse powering the NV350, balancing fuel economy, Euro emissions compliance, and reliable commercial duty cycles.
compatibleVariants: NV350 2.5dCi Cargo, NV350 Minibus, NV350 Premium, Urvan 2.5dCi
commonFailures: High-pressure fuel pump wear on high-mileage units
DPF regeneration failures from short urban journeys
Variable geometry turbo carbon sticking
entries.cta: Get quotes for YD25DDTi Nissan Caravan engine replacement

entries.title: 3.2L Diesel
entries.history: A mid-range torque-focused unit bridging the gap between 2.7L and 4.2L, favoured for medium-duty cargo and passenger conversions.
commonFailures: Bottom-end bearing knock under heavy load
Fuel injection nozzle clogging
Head gasket failure on unmodified cooling systems
entries.cta: Get quotes for QD32ETi Nissan Caravan engine replacement

entries.title: 2.4L Petrol
entries.history: The dominant petrol choice for E24/E25, offering smooth high-revving power and simple maintenance, though timing chain longevity requires attention.
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure causing loud startup rattle
Valve cover gasket oil leaks
Ignition coil pack misfires at idle

entries.title: 3.0L Petrol
entries.history: A smooth V6 option for passenger minibuses, delivering refined performance but vulnerable to oil starvation if service intervals are neglected.
commonFailures: Oil pump pressure drop leading to bearing damage
Intake manifold gasket leaks causing vacuum faults
Distributor wear on early variants

commonProblems.h2: Nissan Caravan Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan Caravan is a proven commercial workhorse, but high mileage and heavy loads expose specific weaknesses in the TD27, TD42, KA24, and ZD30 engine families. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.group: Nissan Caravan TD27 Head Gasket Failure
problems.h4: Nissan Caravan TD27 Head Gasket Failure - Why 2.7L Diesel Engines Blow Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Caravan E24 2.7D, E25 2.7D (1986-2001, TD27 & TD27ETi)
problems.rootCause: High thermal cycling and original single-layer gasket design cannot withstand sustained commercial torque loads, causing combustion pressure breach.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Head skim, multi-layer steel gasket install, upgraded head bolts
repairOptions.longevity: 30k-50k miles if block and cooling system are sound

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New/reconditioned head, timing reset, full coolant flush
repairOptions.longevity: 40k-60k miles, viable if block compression is healthy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete short/long block swap, upgraded gaskets, bench-tested

problems.recommendation: For E24/E25 commercial vans over 90k miles, a full rebuilt unit is the only cost-effective solution. Partial repairs often fail within 12 months due to underlying block stress and warped coolant passages.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt TD27 Nissan Caravan engine prices for your fleet van

problems.group: Nissan Caravan KA24 Timing Chain Stretch
problems.h4: Nissan Caravan KA24 Timing Chain Stretch - Why 2.4L Petrol Units Rattle on Startup
problems.rootCause: Factory tensioners lose hydraulic pressure and plastic guides wear, allowing chain slack that stresses sprockets and risks valve timing jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Chain, tensioners, guides, cam/crank gear replacement
repairOptions.longevity: 50k-70k miles, only viable before tensioner collapse

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Head removal, valve clearance check, timing reset
repairOptions.longevity: 30k-40k miles, risky if chain already jumped

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete engine swap with reinforced timing components
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles, eliminates chain and guide wear permanently

problems.recommendation: Catch the chain stretch early while the rattle is limited to cold starts. Once the rattling becomes constant or the check engine light flashes, internal damage has likely occurred and a rebuilt unit becomes cheaper than diagnostic trial-and-error.
problems.cta: Find a reconditioned KA24 Nissan Caravan engine with 12-month warranty

problems.group: Nissan Caravan TD42 EGR Cooler Failure
problems.h4: Nissan Caravan TD42 EGR Cooler Failure - Why 4.2L Diesel Engines Crack
problems.rootCause: Thermal shock from rapid temperature swings between exhaust gas recirculation and coolant passages causes internal cooler casting fractures.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Cooler unit swap, valve clean, ECU adaptation reset
repairOptions.longevity: 30k-50k miles, does not address turbo bearing wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete TD42 replacement, upgraded cooling routes, tested
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles, resolves cooler, turbo, and block stress

problems.recommendation: The E28 TD42 is a heavy-duty unit where cooler failure often signals broader thermal fatigue. For commercial operators running high mileage, investing in a fully rebuilt TD42 prevents cascading turbo and cylinder wall damage.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Caravan TD42 replacement from UK specialists

problems.h4: Nissan Caravan ZD30 Injector Failure - Why 3.0L Common Rail Engines Misfire
problems.rootCause: Piezo injector seals degrade, allowing high-pressure fuel leakage that contaminates combustion chambers and triggers limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Four new injectors, coding, rail pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: 40k-60k miles, viable if pump and rail are healthy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete engine swap, fuel system flush, bench-tested
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles, resolves injector, pump, and internal wear

problems.recommendation: If the high-pressure pump shows metal contamination, replacing injectors alone is a false economy. A complete rebuilt ZD30 guarantees a clean fuel circuit and eliminates recurring misfire codes.
problems.cta: Compare Nissan Caravan ZD30 engine replacement prices now

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan Caravan
finalCta.paragraph: Commercial vans cannot afford downtime, and reactive repairs on known weak points rarely deliver long-term value. EngineMarket connects you directly with vetted UK Nissan Caravan specialists who supply fully rebuilt engines with upgraded failure-prone components, tested on the bench before delivery, backed by a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, and installed nationwide without the main dealer premium. Compare transparent quotes and get back on the road with a reliable, long-term power unit.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan Caravan Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket’s UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan Caravan and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

fuelTypes.h2: Nissan Caravan Engines by Fuel Type
fuelTypes.intro: Choose your Nissan Caravan engine by fuel type to compare realistic replacement prices, known issues, and compatible UK supply options - from early E24 mechanical diesels to the latest NV350 common-rail units.

items.title: Nissan Caravan Diesel Engines
items.description: Diesel power dominates UK Caravan sales across E24, E25, E28, E29 and NV350 generations, accounting for the vast majority of commercial replacement enquiries due to high mileage usage and known thermal/fuel system vulnerabilities.
items.descriptor: Diesel power dominates UK Caravan sales across E24, E25, E28, E29 and NV350 generations, accounting for the vast majority of commercial replacement enquiries due to high mileage usage and known thermal/fuel system vulnerabilities.
items.familiesLabel: Common Nissan Caravan Diesel Engine Families
families: TD27 - high-volume 2.7L workhorse, head gasket weakness
TD42 - heavy-duty 4.2L unit, EGR cooler failure prone
YD25DDTi - modern 2.5L NV350 standard, DPF/turbo issues
QD32ETi - 3.2L mid-range torque, bearing wear risk
knownFor: Excellent motorway fuel economy and high mileage durability
TD27 head gasket failures between 80k-120k miles
ZD30/YD25 injector and turbo sensitivity to poor diesel quality
Strong UK breaker and specialist rebuild availability
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Caravan Diesel replacement engines

items.title: Nissan Caravan Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol variants serve lighter duty, passenger-focused and urban delivery roles, offering smoother operation but higher fuel costs and distinct timing chain/oil system failure patterns.
items.descriptor: Petrol variants serve lighter duty, passenger-focused and urban delivery roles, offering smoother operation but higher fuel costs and distinct timing chain/oil system failure patterns.
items.familiesLabel: Common Nissan Caravan Petrol Engine Families
families: KA24DE - reliable 2.4L unit, timing chain stretch risk
VG30E - refined 3.0L V6, oil pump starvation weakness
QR20DE - modern 2.0L NV350 option, coil degradation
foundIn: E24 Passenger & Early Vans (1986-1999) - KA20, early KA24
E25/E28 Minibus & City Vans (2001-2011) - KA24DE, VG30E
knownFor: Quiet operation ideal for passenger and light commercial use
KA24 timing chain tensioner failure past 60k miles
VG30 oil pump pressure drop causing rapid bearing wear
Lower replacement costs but higher running expenses
items.cta: Compare Nissan Caravan Petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Caravan CNG / Alternative Fuel Engines
items.description: A niche dual-fuel configuration offered on select NV350 fleet vehicles, combining petrol base architecture with compressed natural gas storage for urban emission compliance.
items.descriptor: A niche dual-fuel configuration offered on select NV350 fleet vehicles, combining petrol base architecture with compressed natural gas storage for urban emission compliance.
families: YD25 CNG - dual-fuel 2.5L base, modified ECU mapping
Compressed natural gas injectors supplement petrol fuel delivery
Automatic switching system optimises for emissions zones
Engine replacement requires full CNG system inspection and certification
importantNotes: No plug-in hybrid or full electric Caravan variant exists in UK market
CNG tank certification mandatory after any engine replacement
Specialist availability limited compared to standard diesel/petrol units
items.cta: Enquire about Nissan Caravan CNG engine availability

engineYears.h2: Nissan Caravan Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Nissan Caravan production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The original E24 Caravan established the commercial van template, introducing mechanically simple diesel and petrol powertrains built for durability over refinement.
keyChanges: E24 platform replaces older Homy/King Van architecture
TD23 and TD27 mechanical diesel units introduced
KA20 and early KA24 petrol options launched
LWB and SWB body styles established
knownFor: Robust cast-iron blocks with minimal electronic complexity
Manual injection systems tolerating poor fuel quality
Limited cabin comfort but exceptional mechanical longevity
years.cta: Get quotes for 1986-1990 Nissan Caravan replacement engines

years.description: Mid-life updates introduced turbocharged variants and refined cooling systems to support heavier payloads and stricter emissions standards.
keyChanges: TD27ETi electronically controlled diesel debuts
QD32ETi 3.2L unit added for medium-duty applications
Improved alternator and EGR routing for early emissions compliance
Interior trim upgrades for passenger variants
knownFor: TD27 head gasket weakness first documented in high-mileage fleet use
QD32 provides strong mid-range torque but requires strict oil changes
VG30 V6 brings smooth power but oil pump vulnerability emerges
years.cta: Find rebuilt 1996-2000 Nissan Caravan engine prices
years.ticker: Nissan Caravan E24 2.7D engine replacement • TD27 head gasket rebuild cost • QD32ETi injector pump failure

years.description: The shift to E25 and E28 platforms modernised aerodynamics, introduced common-rail readiness, and separated cargo and passenger specifications.
keyChanges: E25 replaces E24 for standard commercial vans
E28 high-roof and 4WD variants launched
KA24DE replaces older petrol units
TD42 heavy-duty diesel introduced for towing applications
knownFor: KA24DE timing chain tensioner issues begin appearing
TD42 EGR cooler design proves vulnerable to thermal stress
Cabin noise reduction and improved dashboard ergonomics
years.cta: Compare 2001-2005 Nissan Caravan engine replacement costs

years.description: Modern common-rail technology arrives with the ZD30DDTi, delivering higher power and lower emissions but introducing new fuel system sensitivities.
keyChanges: ZD30DDTi replaces older mechanical diesels in E29
Electronic engine management and DPF readiness introduced
Interior safety features and passenger airbags added
NV350 prototype development begins
knownFor: ZD30 piezo injectors become a major replacement driver
Improved highway refinement and reduced vibration
DPF warning lights appear on short-journey urban vans
years.cta: Get quotes for 2006-2010 Nissan Caravan replacement engines
years.ticker: Nissan Caravan ZD30 injector failure • E29 3.0dCi engine swap • VG30 oil pump replacement cost

years.description: The E26 NV350 redesign modernises the Caravan with car-like handling, advanced safety tech, and the YD25DDTi powertrain optimised for Euro 5 compliance.
keyChanges: NV350/E26 platform replaces E25/E29 entirely
YD25DDTi becomes standard diesel across range
QR20DE petrol option introduced for urban delivery
CNG dual-fleet variant debuts
knownFor: YD25 delivers strong fuel economy but turbo sensitivity noted
Modern cabin with improved driver ergonomics and tech
Early NV350 units still within manufacturer warranty window
years.cta: Find rebuilt 2012-2016 Nissan Caravan engine prices

years.description: Updated emissions controls, refined YD25 mapping, and improved cabin tech solidify the NV350 as the UK commercial standard, with replacement demand growing as warranty expires.
keyChanges: NV350 mid-cycle facelift and suspension tweaks
YD25DDTi remapped for improved low-RPM torque
Advanced driver assistance systems added
Stricter emissions testing drives fleet turnover
knownFor: YD25 high-pressure pump wear becomes primary failure point
Excellent urban manoeuvrability and loading capacity
Growing specialist rebuild availability as fleet mileage increases
years.cta: Compare 2017-2026 Nissan Caravan engine replacement prices now
years.ticker: NV350 YD25 engine replacement cost • 2020+ Caravan diesel rebuild • QR20DE timing cover leak

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Nissan Caravan was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12-month warranty from UK Nissan Caravan specialists.

faq.h2: Nissan Caravan Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Will a Nissan Navara TD27 fit my Caravan?
items.answer: Yes, the TD27 engine block and core mounting points are shared between the Navara D22 and E24/E25 Caravan, but sump, turbo, and ECU wiring differ significantly between commercial van and pickup applications.
keyPoints: Engine block and bellhousing pattern are identical
Oil sump shape differs, requires Caravan-specific unit
Turbo and exhaust manifold routing must be swapped
ECU and immobiliser coding requires specialist reprogramming
Verify engine code suffix matches your van variant before purchase
items.cta: Compare rebuilt TD27 Nissan Caravan engine prices for your fleet van

items.question: How much to replace Nissan Caravan engine UK?
items.answer: UK supply-only rebuilt engines for the Nissan Caravan typically range from £1,100 for older 2.7L TD27 units to £3,200 for modern 4.2L TD42 or 3.0L ZD30 common-rail replacements, excluding fitting labour.
keyPoints: TD27 and QD32 rebuilds start around £1,100-£2,400
TD42 and YD25 common rail units cost £1,500-£3,200
Labour for supply and fit adds £800-£1,500 nationwide
Price varies by mileage warranty length and specialist location
Always request itemised quotes to avoid hidden core charges
items.cta: Find a reconditioned Nissan Caravan engine with 12-month warranty

items.question: What is the most reliable Caravan engine?
items.answer: The TD27 mechanical diesel remains the most reliable when properly maintained, while the NV350 YD25DDTi offers modern efficiency but requires strict fuel quality adherence to avoid common-rail injector failure.
keyPoints: TD27 simple mechanical injection reduces electronic failure risk
KA24 petrol is smooth but timing chain tensioners wear early
YD25 delivers excellent economy but sensitive to contaminated fuel
TD42 handles heavy loads well but EGR cooler requires monitoring
Regular oil changes and coolant flushes double engine lifespan
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Caravan engine replacement from UK specialists

items.question: Can I fit a TD42 into a TD27 Caravan?
items.answer: Direct TD42 swap into a TD27 chassis is highly complex and generally not cost-effective due to different engine mounts, sump clearance, transmission bellhousing patterns, and ECU compatibility.
keyPoints: Bellhousing bolt pattern and flywheel differ between codes
Mounting brackets require custom fabrication
Wiring loom and ECU are not cross-compatible without major mods
Cooling system capacity may be insufficient for TD42 heat output
Vehicle insurance and MOT legality must be verified first
items.cta: Enquire about custom Nissan Caravan engine conversions

items.question: Why does my Caravan TD27 keep blowing head gaskets?
items.answer: Repeated TD27 head gasket failure usually stems from warped cylinder heads, degraded coolant passages, or use of standard gaskets instead of upgraded multi-layer steel replacements under commercial load.
keyPoints: Factory single-layer gaskets fail under high thermal cycling
Cylinder head must be pressure-tested and skimmed flat
ARP upgraded head bolts prevent bolt stretch under torque
Cooling system flush removes corrosion restricting heat transfer
Overloading beyond van payload rating accelerates failure
items.cta: Compare MLS gasket TD27 Nissan Caravan repair and rebuild quotes

items.question: What is the engine code for my Nissan Caravan?
items.answer: Your Nissan Caravan engine code is stamped on a metal plate attached to the cylinder block near the starter motor or oil filter housing, and matches your V5C logbook or DVLA registration lookup.
keyPoints: TD27, TD42, KA24, ZD30, YD25 are primary UK codes
DVLA online check confirms exact factory-fitted unit
VIN plate in driver door jamb lists primary engine type
Specialist quotes require accurate code to guarantee fitment
Cross-reference generation year to avoid ECU mismatch
items.cta: Verify your Nissan Caravan engine code instantly via DVLA check

items.question: Are Nissan Caravan and Urvan engines the same?
items.answer: Yes, Nissan Caravan and Urvan share identical engine codes, mounting points, and internal architecture, as Urvan is simply an international nameplate for the same commercial van platform.
keyPoints: TD27, TD42, and YD25 are fitted to both models
Minor differences exist in turbo housing or ECU mapping by region
Rebuilt units are cross-compatible with correct ancillary swap
UK Urvan registrations are rare but mechanically identical
Always confirm generation year and payload rating first
items.cta: Get quotes for Urvan and Nissan Caravan engine replacements

items.question: What warranty on reconditioned Caravan engines?
items.answer: Reconditioned Nissan Caravan engines supplied through EngineMarket carry a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty as standard, covering internal mechanical failures and manufacturing defects.
keyPoints: 12-month cover starts from installation date
Unlimited mileage applies to commercial van usage
Labour costs for removal and refitting may vary by garage
Warranty voids if oil changes or coolant flushes are neglected
Keep all fitting invoices for warranty validation
items.cta: Find a reconditioned Nissan Caravan engine with 12-month warranty

items.question: How long does a Nissan TD27 engine last?
items.answer: A properly serviced TD27 diesel in a Nissan Caravan routinely reaches 150,000 to 200,000 miles before major overhaul, with many fleet vehicles exceeding 250,000 miles when coolant and oil systems are strictly maintained.
keyPoints: Cast-iron block tolerates high thermal stress well
Head gasket failure at 80k-120k miles is the primary limit
Turbo rebuild extends life by 50,000-80,000 miles
Fuel injection pump overhaul restores smooth idle
Commercial duty cycles accelerate wear but remain predictable
items.cta: Compare rebuilt TD27 Nissan Caravan engine prices for long life

items.question: Where to buy a Nissan Caravan engine near me?
items.answer: EngineMarket aggregates quotes from vetted UK engine specialists nationwide, allowing you to compare supply-only and supply-and-fit prices from local rebuilders without visiting multiple breaker yards.
keyPoints: Network covers all major UK regions with commercial van bays
Specialist quotes delivered within hours via registration lookup
Supply-only or nationwide delivery and installation available
Compare warranty terms, rebuilt pricing, and turnaround times
Verified ratings ensure quality control and consumer protection
items.cta: Compare Nissan Caravan engine replacement prices from local UK specialists
